moves.name: HE shell
moves.desc: fire a shot at the opponent using the main barrel.

moves.name: ramming speed!
moves.desc: run over your opponent. the soldiers charriot cannot be stopped.

moves.name: machine gun!
moves.desc: brrrt goes the machine gun! causes bleed (burn actually).

moves.name: AP shell
moves.desc: fires an armor piercing shell, decreasing enemy armor..

moves.name: drone strike
moves.desc: buzzing sound from the propellers, then a boom. enemies gone.

moves.name: emergency repairs
moves.desc: repair your tank incase of emergency. takes a bit, as tanks are complicated
